case_title: BERTORELLI, GANDI, WON & BEHTI VS. HEARTLINE PRODUCTIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERTORELLI, GANDI, WON & BEHTI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERTORELLI, GANDI, WON & BEHTI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEARTLINE PRODUCTIONS, INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,560.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERTORELLI, GANDI, WON & BEHTI

TRIAL RESET TO DEC-10-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-05-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
